nodes.label: AI as professional writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I often use AI to help me with professional writing

nodes.label: AI for routine content generation
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes the posts are very similar to what we have posted before

nodes.label: AI for novel content ideation
nodes.grounding_span: When I post something new, I often start with a simple and general prompt

nodes.label: AI reliability for image generation
nodes.grounding_span: There were times i tried to use AI to generate a particular image and it did not look that good

nodes.label: AI for high-stakes operational tasks
nodes.grounding_span: tasks that need my full attention and mistakes could be made easily, so it is better for me to do it myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: having AI assist us in this creative writing is very helpful

nodes.label: Quality and accuracy of output
nodes.grounding_span: I always double check it and make some edits so it is exactly how I like

nodes.label: Control and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: tasks that need my full attention and mistakes could be made easily, so it is better for me to do it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for writing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: having AI assist us in this creative writing is very helpful, which I would say is very satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation
nodes.grounding_span: it did not look that good, which was pretty frustrating

nodes.label: Openness to increased AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I will definitely use it as much as I have been up until now, if not a bit more as AI gets better

nodes.label: Task-adaptive approach: varies strategy based on routine vs novel
nodes.grounding_span: When I post something new, I often start with a simple and general prompt

nodes.label: Iterative refinement: drafts then polishes with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I usually create a rough draft which I then ask the AI to polish
